# Harshdeep Singh — Full Stack Developer

> Harshdeep Singh is a Canada-based full stack developer with 5+ years of experience specializing in React, TypeScript, Node.js, AI automation, and production web applications. He is available for freelance work via Toptal.

## About

- Full name: Harshdeep Singh
- Location: Canada
- Role: Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Engineer
- Experience: 5+ years
- Specializations: React, TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, LangChain, Playwright, CI/CD
- Freelance: https://www.toptal.com/resume/harshdeep-singh
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/harshdeepsingh13/
- GitHub: https://github.com/harshdeepsingh13/

## Blog

The blog at /blog contains technical articles on full stack development, React, TypeScript, Node.js, and AI automation. Each post is available at /blog/[slug].
